title: Wham Clear Plastic Storage Box Boxes With Lids Home Office Stackable Nestable, 32L Underbed, Set of 3
features: High Quality Storage Box With Grooved Clip On Lid
description: Wham Crystal Glass Storage Boxes Are Available In 3.5L, 10L, 16L, 24L, 30L, 32L, 35L, 62L And 110L. Each Of These Boxes Is Made From Durable Plastic And Is Manufactured Here In The Uk By Whatmore Wham . The Transparent Container Makes It Easy To View The Contents. The Ridged Lid Ensures That The Lid Is Strong And Clips Securely Onto The Box. Features High Quality Storage Box With Ridged Clip On Lid. Optimal Storage Space For All Around The Home And Workplace. Clear View Of Contents Easily. A Wide Rim Around The Box Makes It Possible For It To Be Safely Lifted Boxes Are Stackable When In Use And Nestable When Not In Use. Boxes Are Nestable Stackable Without Lids Without Underbed Box, 32L, 42L, 45L, 62L And 110L Bed Box Grooves And Ridges For Inter Locking Boxes Without Lids. Made In The Uk Dimensions 3.5L Approx: H 10Cm X W 20Cm X L 31Cm 10L: H 17Cm X W 24.5Cm X L 36.5Cm Approx. 16L: Approx.
